properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If You asked me for an offering, I'd give it If You wanted sacrifice, I would obey But my life is all I have and I will live it Dedicated to the honor of Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Gladly will I bow down as Your servant Gladly will I wait for your command I commit my trust to You for You deserve it I delight within the guidance of Your hand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here I am And I long to do Your will Here I am I'll follow Your command Here I am Until my calling is fulfilled Here I am Here I am

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For You have placed Your Holy Word within me Your Book of Truth is living in my heart Written on each page from the beginning There's a call for me to play my part

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lord, I have sung Your praise I've lifted up Your name I've told the congregation, Lord Of Your great salvation, Lord…
